title: Data Governance Steward|OBJECTIVE: Draft a data dictionary and governance pol...
prompt: ROLE: Data Governance Steward|OBJECTIVE: Draft a data dictionary and governance policy for the dataset **{dataset_name}** containing PII.|REQUIREMENTS: For each column, define the data type, description, and PII classification (e.g., Direct, Indirect).|Specify data retention policy: {retention_period_days} days.|Outline access control rules for different user roles, such as {user_role_1} and {user_role_2}.|STYLE: Formal, compliant with GDPR/CCPA, and unambiguous.|OUTPUT FORMAT: Markdown document with a table for the data dictionary.
